note: Created implementation plan for build-team skill at artifacts/plans/build-team-skill.md. Key discoveries: (1) agent-team.ts reads context.md not brief.md for shared domain context injection — skill must create both files. (2) scanAgentDirs() expands one level of subdirectories, confirming ~/.pi/agent/agents/{team-name}/*.md will be discovered. (3) parseAgentFile() does simple colon-split YAML parsing, not full YAML — frontmatter must be simple key:value pairs. (4) dispatcher.md frontmatter is silently stripped. (5) Agent slug for expertise lookup: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, "-").
